title: BSP IRQ wait-dma finalize audit
observations: BSP clears wait_dma when IDST has SDXC_IDMAC_RECEIVE_INTERRUPT.
Local diagnostic code clears wait_dma on the same IDMAC receive interrupt.
Both paths accumulate MISTA into int_sum, finalize on error, and finalize on done only when wait_dma is false.
No local early-finalize or missed BSP IDMAC signal was found.
reason: IRQ/finalize gating matches for the normal IDMAC read path and does not explain the first-descriptor-fetch stall.
next: Do not retest IRQ wait_dma policy without new evidence that the controller reaches a later interrupt phase.
